message:
fix(sync): deduplicate dependencies on export to match import normalization

The import path deduplicates dependencies by (issue_id, depends_on_id),
keeping the entry with the latest created_at. But the export path did not,
creating a roundtrip asymmetry: export → import could silently drop
duplicate dependency entries.

Now export applies the same dedup logic before serializing to JSONL,
ensuring export → import → export produces identical output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
